description: Manage your Plesk hosting server using AI assistants.
name: io.github.FlayedOne/plesk-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your Plesk server. May include port. Example: https://plesk.example.com:8443
environmentVariables.name: PLESK_HOST

environmentVariables.description: Plesk API key. Create via `plesk bin secret_key --create -description 'Plesk MCP'` on the server. Required, unless PLESK_USERNAME and PLESK_PASSWORD are provided.
environmentVariables.name: PLESK_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Username for authenticating with your Plesk server. Typically "admin".
environmentVariables.name: PLESK_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: Password for authenticating with your Plesk server.
environmentVariables.name: PLESK_PASSWORD
